summary: Archived native performance matrix evidence from earlier benchmark sampling. Active preview review uses automated benchmarks plus concise release-risk notes.
archiveNote: Kept only as historical context. This file is not an H5/H6 blocker and must not be turned into an owner row-by-row task.

completedEntries.notes: Single visible animation sample retained as historical performance evidence.

completedEntries.scenario: All nine Android SVG performance matrix rows
completedEntries.memory: before/after PSS and RSS captured per artifact
completedEntries.notes: Release-emulator samples captured with adb launch timing, gfxinfo, before/after meminfo, gesture/tap input where applicable, and screenshots. Active release notes summarize remaining performance risk instead of requiring matrix completion.

completedEntries.scenario: All nine iOS SVG performance matrix rows
completedEntries.notes: Release-simulator samples captured with simctl deep-link launch timing, process RSS, and screenshots. Active release notes summarize remaining performance risk instead of requiring matrix completion.

requiredScenarios: range selector drag and thumb resize
scrollable bar horizontal scroll and selection
combined chart shared tooltip and legend
candlestick pan, pinch, and tap inspection
historicalGaps: No longer tracked as required matrix rows. See benchmark output, smoke-test-checks.md, and known-issues.md for current release risk.
